# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Launch a stunning online store with ShelfWise. Create your shopify ecommerce website for books in minutes. Powerful tools, beautiful designs, endless possibilities.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how ShelfWise revolutionizes online book selling. We help independent sellers and publishers build thriving shopify ecommerce stores with expert guidance and support.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to launch your shopify ecommerce website? Our team is here to answer questions and guide you through creating the perfect online store for your book business.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - ShelfWise

### Cart
https://example.com/cart
Your Cart

https://example.com/checkout
Checkout

https://example.com/login

https://example.com/account

Thank you for your order

https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - ShelfWise

https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - ShelfWise
